causal_question: For district-election observations with nearly tied vote shares, what is the causal effect of a Democratic win in election t on the representative's ADA roll-call score in session t (i.e., the effect among near-tied races)?
vague_question: In very close U.S. House elections, how much more (or less) liberal is the representative's roll-call voting when the Democrat narrowly wins compared with when the Democrat narrowly loses?
